command: export AGENT_LOG_DIR=".gitban/agents/reviewer/logs" && export AGENT_ROLE="reviewer" && export AGENT_SPRINT_TAG="TTSNATIVE" && export AGENT_CARD_ID="gvleuv" && export AGENT_CYCLE="2" && source .gitban/hooks/agent-log.sh && agent_log_init && echo "logged"

git status 2>&1 | head -20; echo "---diff unstaged---"; git diff 2>&1 | head -20

git status 2>&1 | head -10; echo "---branch---"; git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>&1; echo "---current VERSION---"; cat VERSION; echo "---fork tags 2.18+---"; git ls-remote --tags fork 2>&1 | awk '$2 ~ /v2\.(1[89]|2)/' | head -20

git add VERSION CHANGELOG.md .gitban/ && git status --short | head -10; echo "---commit---"; git commit --amend -m "chore: bump version to 2.21.0 (minor: TTSNATIVE + pwsh-fallback resiliency)

git reset --soft HEAD~2 && git status --short | head -5; echo "---redo commit---"; git commit -m "chore: bump version to 2.21.0 (minor: TTSNATIVE + pwsh-fallback resiliency)

git status --short | head -5; echo "---forcing push (we rewrote history)---"; git push --force-with-lease fork sprint/TTSNATIVE 2>&1 | tail -3; echo "---divergence from fork/main---"; git rev-list --left-right --count fork/main...sprint/TTSNATIVE

cat <<'EOF'
gh pr create --draft \
  --repo muunkky/peon-ping \
  --base main \
  --head sprint/TTSNATIVE \
  --title "feat(tts-native): ship platform-native TTS backends (v2.21.0)" \
  --body "$(cat <<'BODY'
## Summary

Ships `scripts/tts-native.sh` + `scripts/tts-native.ps1` so `tts.enabled: true` produces actual audible speech on macOS (`say`), Linux (piper → espeak-ng priority chain), and Windows (SAPI5 via `System.Speech.Synthesis`). Before this, `tts.enabled` only emitted a cue line — no sound.

Releases as **v2.21.0** (minor bump: new platform support + new `--list-voices` / `-ListVoices` CLI surface).

## What landed

- `scripts/tts-native.sh` (Unix: macOS, Linux, MSYS2 bridge) + `tests/tts-native.bats` (42 scenarios)
- `scripts/tts-native.ps1` (Windows SAPI5) + `tests/tts-native.Tests.ps1` (40 Pester scenarios including pipeline binding, case-insensitive voice resolution, spaced SAPI5 voice names)
- `install.sh` / `install.ps1` wiring (both installers now copy the new scripts)
- `install.ps1` cleanup: extracted `Install-HelperScript` function (3 copy-or-download blocks collapsed to 1)
- awk hardening in `scripts/tts-native.sh` (rate/volume via `awk -v`, not string interpolation — prevents injection from hostile config)
- `tests/peon-engine.Tests.ps1` timezone-kind fix (ConvertFrom-Json Kind=Utc vs \`[datetime]"...Z"\` Kind=Local)
- `tests/setup.bash` python3 PATH-resolved (was hardcoded \`/usr/bin/python3\`, broke on Git Bash / non-standard hosts)
- `peon` CLI shims (peon.cmd + bash wrapper) prefer `pwsh` with `powershell` fallback — sidesteps PS 5.1 / PS 7 module clash when PSModulePath is polluted
- Roadmap node `v2/m5/tts-native` → \`done\` (m5 milestone stays in_progress; tts-cli / tts-notifications / tts-docs / tts-elevenlabs / tts-piper still planned)

## Test plan

- [x] BATS `tests/tts-native.bats` 42/42 green locally
- [x] Pester `tests/tts-native.Tests.ps1` 40/40 green
- [x] Pester `tests/adapters-windows.Tests.ps1` 423/423 green (2 new structural assertions for the pwsh-fallback shims)
- [x] Pester `tests/peon-engine.Tests.ps1` \`accepts StateOverrides\` 1/1 green on both pwsh 7.5 and PS 5.1
- [x] Live audibility smoke: \`'hello' | pwsh -File scripts/tts-native.ps1\` speaks on Windows SAPI5
- [ ] CI: BATS on macos-latest, Pester on windows-latest (will run when PR opens)
- [ ] Real-hardware capstones (gvleuv-owned, post-merge): macOS \`say\` smoke, Linux \`espeak-ng\` smoke, ±50ms latency regression on \`[exit] duration_ms\`
BODY
)"
EOF

gh pr create --draft --repo muunkky/peon-ping --base main --head sprint/TTSNATIVE --title "feat(tts-native): ship platform-native TTS backends (v2.21.0)" --body "$(cat <<'BODY'
## Summary

Ships `scripts/tts-native.sh` + `scripts/tts-native.ps1` so `tts.enabled: true` produces actual audible speech on macOS (`say`), Linux (piper → espeak-ng priority chain), and Windows (SAPI5 via `System.Speech.Synthesis`). Before this, `tts.enabled` only emitted a cue line — no sound.

Releases as **v2.21.0** (minor bump: new platform support + new `--list-voices` / `-ListVoices` CLI surface).

## What landed

- `scripts/tts-native.sh` (Unix: macOS, Linux, MSYS2 bridge) + `tests/tts-native.bats` (42 scenarios)
- `scripts/tts-native.ps1` (Windows SAPI5) + `tests/tts-native.Tests.ps1` (40 Pester scenarios: pipeline binding, case-insensitive voice resolution, spaced SAPI5 voice names)
- `install.sh` / `install.ps1` wiring
- `install.ps1` cleanup: extracted `Install-HelperScript` (3 copy-or-download blocks → 1)
- awk hardening in `scripts/tts-native.sh` (rate/volume via `awk -v` — prevents injection from hostile config)
- `tests/peon-engine.Tests.ps1` timezone-kind fix (ConvertFrom-Json Kind=Utc vs [datetime] cast Kind=Local)
- `tests/setup.bash` python3 PATH-resolved (was hardcoded `/usr/bin/python3`)
- `peon` CLI shims prefer `pwsh` with `powershell` fallback — sidesteps PS 5.1 / PS 7 PSModulePath clash
- Roadmap node `v2/m5/tts-native` → done (m5 stays in_progress — tts-cli / tts-notifications / tts-docs / tts-elevenlabs / tts-piper still planned)

## Test plan

- [x] BATS tests/tts-native.bats 42/42 green locally
- [x] Pester tests/tts-native.Tests.ps1 40/40 green
- [x] Pester tests/adapters-windows.Tests.ps1 423/423 green (2 new structural assertions for pwsh-fallback shims)
- [x] Pester tests/peon-engine.Tests.ps1 StateOverrides 1/1 green on pwsh 7.5 AND PS 5.1
- [x] Live audibility smoke on Windows SAPI5
- [ ] CI: BATS on macos-latest, Pester on windows-latest
- [ ] Real-hardware capstones (post-merge): macOS say smoke, Linux espeak-ng smoke, ±50ms latency regression
BODY
)" 2>&1 | tail -5

ls .github/workflows/ 2>&1; echo "---triggers---"; grep -l "pull_request\|on:" .github/workflows/*.yml 2>&1 | head -5; echo "---pr runs so far---"; sleep 5 && gh pr checks 1 --repo muunkky/peon-ping 2>&1 | head -10
gh run view --job 72247791709 --repo muunkky/peon-ping --log 2>&1 | grep -E "not ok|FAIL|fail|Error|error|✗|^#" | head -50
gh run view 24702245972 --repo muunkky/peon-ping --log-failed 1>/tmp/failed.log 2>&1; wc -l /tmp/failed.log; head -100 /tmp/failed.log
git ls-tree HEAD scripts/tts-native.sh; echo "---other .sh files for comparison---"; git ls-tree HEAD scripts/*.sh | head -5

git update-index --chmod=+x scripts/tts-native.sh && git ls-tree HEAD scripts/tts-native.sh; echo "---commit + push---"; git commit -m "fix(tts-native.sh): set executable bit on Unix shell script

Git on Windows didn't preserve +x when committing tts-native.sh, so the
macOS BATS CI runner failed AC 'file exists and is executable' at
tests/tts-native.bats line 94. All other scripts/*.sh land as 100755;
tts-native.sh was accidentally 100644." 2>&1 | tail -3; git push fork sprint/TTSNATIVE 2>&1 | tail -3
sleep 10 && gh pr checks 1 --repo muunkky/peon-ping 2>&1 | head -5

echo "=== New files on sprint vs origin/main ==="
git diff --name-status origin/main sprint/TTSNATIVE -- scripts/ tests/ install.sh install.ps1 VERSION CHANGELOG.md | head -30
echo ""
echo "=== Does upstream already have our files? ==="
for f in scripts/tts-native.sh scripts/tts-native.ps1 tests/tts-native.bats tests/tts-native.Tests.ps1 docs/designs/tts-native.md; do
  if git show origin/main:"$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "EXISTS upstream: $f"; else echo "NEW  (ours only): $f"; fi
done
echo ""
echo "=== Modified-file size (lines changed upstream-main -> sprint) ==="
git diff --stat origin/main sprint/TTSNATIVE -- scripts/ tests/ install.sh install.ps1 CHANGELOG.md 2>&1 | head -20

echo "=== Does upstream install.ps1 have Install-HelperScript? ==="
git show origin/main:install.ps1 | grep -n "Install-HelperScript\|win-notify.ps1\|tts-native.ps1\|peon.cmd\|CLI shortcut" 2>&1 | head -20
echo ""
echo "=== upstream install.sh: TTS-relevant lines ==="
git show origin/main:install.sh | grep -n "notify.sh\|tts-native\|scripts/" 2>&1 | head -10
echo ""
echo "=== upstream install.ps1 peon.cmd shim ==="
git show origin/main:install.ps1 | grep -n -A 3 "peonCli = @\|peonShScript = @" 2>&1 | head -20
git diff origin/main sprint/TTSNATIVE -- install.sh 2>&1 | head -40

git checkout -b upstream-pr/tts-native origin/main 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "---HEAD now at---"
git log --oneline -1
echo "---should equal origin/main---"
git rev-parse --short origin/main
